column4: 7001|Undercity — Entry Shaft|undercity|A vertical shaft with a rusty ladder. Light from above fades quickly. The smell hits you like a wall.||||||up:13
column5: 7002|Undercity — Landing|undercity|The bottom of the shaft. Tunnels branch in multiple directions. Graffiti marks territory.||||||

column3: 7003|Sewer Main — West|undercity|A large tunnel with a channel of flowing waste. A narrow walkway runs along one side.||||||
column4: 7004|Sewer Main — Junction|undercity|Three tunnels meet here. The water is deeper. Something large splashed around the corner.||||||
column5: 7005|Sewer Main — East|undercity|The tunnel narrows. Pipes overhead drip constantly. Rats scatter at your approach.||||||
column6: 7006|Maintenance Room|undercity|A small room with valves and gauges. Someone has been sleeping here — a bedroll and empty cans.||||||

column2: 7007|Collapsed Tunnel — West|undercity|The tunnel has partially collapsed. Rubble blocks most of the passage. A gap remains.||||||
column3: 7008|Mushroom Cavern|undercity|A natural cave where bioluminescent mushrooms grow in clusters. The air is thick with spores.||||||
column4: 7009|Underground River — Bank|undercity|An underground river flows through a natural cavern. The water is surprisingly clean.||||||
column5: 7010|Underground River — Bridge|training_grounds|A makeshift bridge of planks and rope spans the river. It sways dangerously. A perfectly round tunnel has been bored through the ancient stonework here, leading nowhere — it simply stops after twenty feet, as if whatever made it changed direction mid-bore and went straight up through the ceiling.||1705,1714||tunnel:The tunnel is exactly three inches in diameter, bored through solid stone with no debris whatsoever. The walls are polished smooth. At the end, the bore turns sharply upward through the ceiling — the transition is impossibly sharp, a perfect right angle. Whatever made this didn't slow down, didn't turn gradually. It just... changed direction. Instantly.||
column6: 7011|Rat King's Domain|undercity|A large chamber filled with refuse. Thousands of rats move as one organism. Their king watches.||||||
column7: 7012|Forgotten Cistern|undercity|A massive water storage chamber. Empty now. Echoes last forever in here.||||||

column2: 7013|Smuggler's Cache|undercity|A hidden room behind a false wall. Crates of contraband. Someone's retirement fund.||||||
column3: 7014|The Depths — Upper|undercity|Older tunnels. The stonework is different — pre-Nexus construction. Something was here first.||||||
column4: 7015|The Depths — Chamber|undercity|A circular chamber with pillars. Carvings in a language no one reads anymore.||||||
column5: 7016|The Depths — Altar|undercity|An ancient altar in the deepest chamber. Dark stains. The air vibrates with old power.||||||
column6: 7017|Flooded Passage|undercity|Water fills this tunnel to waist height. The current pulls southward. Cold.||||||

column3: 7018|Undercity Market|undercity|A black market in a widened tunnel. Stolen goods, information, and things that shouldn't exist.|shop|||||
column4: 7019|The Pit|undercity|A natural sinkhole. Rope ladders descend into darkness. Fighters gather here for underground bouts.||||||
column5: 7020|Cultist Hideout|undercity|Robed figures gather around symbols drawn in chalk. They stop chanting when you enter.||||||
column6: 7021|Abandoned Lab|undercity|Someone was conducting experiments down here. Broken glass and chemical stains. Notes in frantic handwriting.||||||

column3: 7022|Undercity — South Tunnel|undercity|A long straight tunnel heading south. The walls are slick with moisture.||||||
column4: 7023|The Hive|undercity|Insectoid creatures have built a nest here from secreted resin. Eggs pulse with dim light.||||||
column5: 7024|Crystal Cavern|undercity|Natural crystals jut from every surface. They glow faintly. Beautiful and disorienting.||||||
column6: 7025|Exit Shaft — South|undercity|Another vertical shaft. This one leads up to somewhere in the Shattered Crown.||||||

column4: 7026|The Warden's Room|undercity|A sealed chamber. Something is imprisoned here. The door has locks on the outside.||||||
column5: 7027|Undercity — Dead End|undercity|The tunnel ends at a solid wall. But the wall is warm. And it pulses.||||||
